---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Christian Escoto"
date: "2025-07-17"
output: pdf_document
---



```{r}

library(asreml)
library(dplyr)
library(aod)

library(dendextend)
```



```{r}
# Columnas predictoras
predictor_columns <- c("catboost", "xgboost", "mboost", "rf", "pcr", 
                       "bayesA", "bayesL", "bayesR", "ll", "le", "lr", "Grain.yield")
```

```{r}
N23.All<-N23.All%>%
    mutate(
    NDVI_mean = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("NDVI")), na.rm = TRUE),
    GNDVI_mean = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("GNDVI")), na.rm = TRUE),
    EVI_mean = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("EVI")), na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```



```{r Model 1: Basic model}
model1_results <- list()
model1_summary <- data.frame(
  predictor = character(),
  aic = numeric(),
  bic = numeric(),
  loglik = numeric(),
  heritability = numeric(),
  model_type = character(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
for (predictor in predictor_columns) {
  cat("Model 1 - Process:", predictor, "\n")
  
  tryCatch({
    # Modelo básico con predictor individual
    model1 <- asreml(
      fixed = as.formula(paste(predictor, "~ 1")),
      random = ~ blockNumber + geno,
      residual = ~ id(units),
      data = N23.All,
      ai.sing = TRUE,
      workspace = 500e6,
      maxiter = 50,
      trace = FALSE
    )
    
    model1 <- update(model1)
    model1_results[[predictor]] <- model1
    
    # Estadísticas
    variance_components.model1 <- summary(model1)$varcomp
    var_geno.model1 <- ifelse("geno" %in% rownames(variance_components.model1), 
                       variance_components.model1["geno", "component"], 0)
    var_error.model1 <- variance_components.model1["units", "component"]
    heritability.model1 <- var_geno.model1 / (var_geno.model1 + var_error.model1)
    
    #reliability
    Vg.model1<- summary(model1)$varcomp['geno', 'component']
    G_hat.model1<- predict(model1, classify="geno",   ignore=c("(Intercept)", 'rep'))$pvals
    se.model1<- G_hat.model1$std.error 
    pev.model1<- se.model1^2
    rel.model1<- 1-(pev.model1/Vg.model1)

    
    model1_summary <- rbind(model1_summary, data.frame(
      predictor = predictor,
      aic = model1$loglik - model1$nedf,
      bic = -2 * model1$loglik + log(nrow(N23.All)) * model1$nedf,
      loglik = model1$loglik,
      heritability = heritability.model1,
      reliability.mean = mean(rel.model1),
      model_type = "Model1_Basic"
    ))
    
    cat("✓ Complete:", predictor, "\n")
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("✗ Error:", predictor, "-", e$message, "\n")
  })
}

# Almacenar resultados
model1_summary
```

```{r Model 2: Basic model with Rep}
# Define Model's components
response_var <- "Grain.yield"
predictor_vars <- variables_selected
random_effects <- "~ blockNumber + geno"
residual<-"~ id(units)"

model2_results <- list()
model2_summary <- data.frame(
  predictor = character(),
  aic = numeric(),
  bic = numeric(),
  loglik = numeric(),
  heritability = numeric(),
  model_type = character(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
N23.optim$best_model_aic

    # Modelo con múltiples predictores
    model2<-asreml(
      fixed = as.formula(paste("Grain.yield" , "~ catboost + mboost + bayesL + bayesR + ll + le + GNDVI_mean + NDVI_mean")),  
          random = ~ blockNumber + geno,
           residual=~ id(units),
          na.action = na.method(x = "include"),
         data=N23.All,  ai.sing = TRUE,  workspace = 500e6)
    
    model2 <- update(model2)
   
    
    # Estadísticas
    variance_components.model2 <- summary(model2)$varcomp
    var_geno.model2 <- ifelse("geno" %in% rownames(variance_components.model2), 
                       variance_components.model2["geno", "component"], 0)
    var_error.model2 <- variance_components.model2["units", "component"]
    heritability.model2 <- var_geno.model2 / (var_geno.model2 + var_error.model2)
    print(heritability.model2)
    #predict
    #save genetic variance in an object
    Vg.model2<- summary(model2)$varcomp['geno', 'component']
    #get the coefficients of the genotype effect
    G_hat.model2<- predict(model2, classify="geno",   ignore=c("(Intercept)", 'rep'))$pvals
    #get the reliability
    se.model2<- G_hat.model2$std.error #standard error of estimates of genetic value
    pev.model2<- se.model2^2
    rel.model2<- 1-(pev.model2/Vg.model2)
    print(mean(rel.model2))
    
    model2_summary <- rbind(model2_summary, data.frame(
      predictor = predictor,
      aic = model2$loglik - model2$nedf,
      bic = -2 * model2$loglik + log(nrow(N23.All)) * model2$nedf,
      loglik = model2$loglik,
      heritability = heritability.model2,
      reliability.mean = mean(rel.model2),
      model_type = "Model2_Basic"
    ))
    
    cat("✓ Complete:", predictor, "\n")
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("✗ Error:", predictor, "-", e$message, "\n")
  })
}

# Almacenar resultados
model2_summary


```


```{r  Model 3: Basic model with Rep}
model3_results <- list()
model3_summary <- data.frame(
  predictor = character(),
  aic = numeric(),
  bic = numeric(),
  loglik = numeric(),
  heritability = numeric(),
  model_type = character(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
for (predictor in predictor_columns) {
  cat("Model 3 - Process:", predictor, "\n")
  
  tryCatch({

    # Modelo con múltiples predictores
    model3 <- asreml(
      fixed = as.formula(paste(predictor, "~ 1")),
      random = ~ at(Rep):units + blockNumber + geno,
      residual = ~ units,
      na.action = na.method(x = "include"),
      data = N23.All,
      ai.sing = TRUE,
      workspace = 500e6)
    
    
    model3 <- update(model3)
    model3_results[[predictor]] <- model3
    
    # statístics
    variance_components.model3 <- summary(model3)$varcomp
    var_geno.model3 <- ifelse("geno" %in% rownames(variance_components.model3), 
                       variance_components.model3["geno", "component"], 0)
    var_error.model3 <- variance_components.model3["units", "component"]
    heritability.model3 <- var_geno.model3 / (var_geno.model3 + var_error.model3)
    
    #predict
    #save genetic variance in an object
    Vg.model3<- summary(model3)$varcomp['geno', 'component']
    #get the coefficients of the genotype effect
    G_hat.model3<- predict(model3, classify="geno",   ignore=c("(Intercept)", 'rep'))$pvals
    #get the reliability
    se.model3<- G_hat.model3$std.error #standard error of estimates of genetic value
    pev.model3<- se.model3^2
    rel.model3<- 1-(pev.model3/Vg.model3)


    
    
    model3_summary <- rbind(model3_summary, data.frame(
      predictor = predictor,
      aic= model3$loglik - 2 * model3$nedf,
      bic = -2 * model3$loglik + log(nrow(N23.All)) * model3$nedf,
      loglik = model3$loglik,
      heritability = heritability.model3,
      reliability.mean = mean(rel.model3),
      model_type = "Model3_Basic"
    ))
    
    cat("✓ Complete:", predictor, "\n")
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("✗ Error:", predictor, "-", e$message, "\n")
  })
}

model3_summary

```

`
```{r  Model 4: predict + Grain.yield}

model4_results <- list()

model4_summary <- data.frame(
  predictor = character(),
  aic = numeric(),
  bic = numeric(),
  loglik = numeric(),
  heritability = numeric(),
  reliability.mean = numeric(),
  model_type = character(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (predictor in predictor_columns) {
  cat("Model 4 - Process:", predictor, "\n")
  
  tryCatch({
    # Model with multiple predictors
    model4 <- asreml(
      fixed = as.formula(paste("Grain.yield", "~", predictor)),
      random = ~ at(Rep):units + blockNumber + geno,
      residual = ~ units,
      na.action = na.method(x = "include"),
      data = N23.All,
      ai.sing = TRUE,
      workspace = 500e6
    )
    
    model4 <- update(model4)
    model4_results[[predictor]] <- model4
    
    # Statistics
    variance_components.model4 <- summary(model4)$varcomp
    var_geno.model4 <- ifelse("geno" %in% rownames(variance_components.model4), 
                               variance_components.model4["geno", "component"], 0)
    var_error.model4 <- variance_components.model4["units", "component"]
    heritability.model4 <- var_geno.model4 / (var_geno.model4 + var_error.model4)
    
    # Predict
    # Save genetic variance in an object
    Vg.model4 <- summary(model4)$varcomp['geno', 'component']
    # Get the coefficients of the genotype effect
    G_hat.model4 <- predict(model4, classify = "geno", ignore = c("(Intercept)", 'rep'))$pvals
    # Get the reliability
    se.model4 <- G_hat.model4$std.error # Standard error of estimates of genetic value
    pev.model4 <- se.model4^2
    rel.model4 <- 1 - (pev.model4 / Vg.model4)
    
    model4_summary <- rbind(model4_summary, data.frame(
      predictor = predictor,
      aic = model4$loglik - 2 * model4$nedf,
      bic = -2 * model4$loglik + log(nrow(N23.All)) * model4$nedf,
      loglik = model4$loglik,
      heritability = heritability.model4,
      reliability.mean = mean(rel.model4),
      model_type = "model4_Basic"
    ))
    
    cat("✓ Complete:", predictor, "\n")
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("✗ Error:", predictor, "-", e$message, "\n")
  })
}

model4_summary

```

```{r}

 model6 <- asreml(
      fixed = as.formula(Grain.yield ~ NDVI_mean + EVI_mean),
      random = ~ at(Rep):units + blockNumber + geno,
      residual = ~ units,
      na.action = na.method(x = "include"),
      data = N23.All,
      ai.sing = TRUE,
      workspace = 500e6
    )


 model6 <- update(model6)
 model6$loglik

```

```{r}
# Define your dataset and parameters
response_var <- "Grain.yield"
predictor_vars <- c("catboost", "xgboost", "mboost", "rf", "pcr", 
                      "bayesA", "bayesL", "bayesR", "ll", "le", "lr",  "NDVI_mean", "EVI_mean", "GNDVI_mean")

random_effects <- "~ at(Rep):units + blockNumber + geno"

# Call the function
N23.optim <- optimize_model(N23.All, response_var, predictor_vars, random_effects)


```


```{r Select important variables and Cross validation, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(asreml)

# Configuración inicial
set.seed(123)


variables_candidates <- c("catboost", "xgboost", "mboost", "rf", "pcr", 
                          "bayesA", "bayesL", "bayesR", "ll", "le", "lr",  
                          "NDVI_mean", "EVI_mean", "GNDVI_mean")

analyze_correlations <- function(data, variables) {
  
  cat("== Correlation Analysis ==\n")
  
  # Correlation matrix
  cor_matrix <- cor(data[, variables], use = "complete.obs")
  
  cat("Correlation matrix:\n")
  print(round(cor_matrix, 3))
  
  # Identify variables comparisons with high correlation 
  high_cor_threshold <- 0.9
  high_cor_pairs <- which(abs(cor_matrix) > high_cor_threshold & cor_matrix != 1, arr.ind = TRUE)
  
  if (nrow(high_cor_pairs) > 0) {
    cat("\n Comparison >", high_cor_threshold, ":\n")
    for (i in 1:nrow(high_cor_pairs)) {
      row_idx <- high_cor_pairs[i, 1]
      col_idx <- high_cor_pairs[i, 2]
      if (row_idx < col_idx) {  
        var1 <- rownames(cor_matrix)[row_idx]
        var2 <- colnames(cor_matrix)[col_idx]
        correlation <- cor_matrix[row_idx, col_idx]
        cat("  ", var1, "vs", var2, ":", round(correlation, 3), "\n")
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Hierarchical grouping
  dist_matrix <- as.dist(1 - abs(cor_matrix))
  hc <- hclust(dist_matrix, method = "ward.D2")
  
  # Optimal number of cluster or groups
  heights <- hc$height
  #cut off
  optimal_cut <- 0.4  
  
  groups <- cutree(hc, h = optimal_cut)
  
  cat("\nGrouping variables (cutoff", optimal_cut, "):\n")
  for (group_id in unique(groups)) {
    group_vars <- names(groups)[groups == group_id]
    cat("Group", group_id, ":", paste(group_vars, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
  
  return(list(
    correlation_matrix = cor_matrix,
    variable_groups = groups,
    dendrogram = hc
  ))
}

cor<-analyze_correlations(N23.All, variables_candidates)
den<-cor$dendrogram

plot(as.dendrogram(den))
rect.hclust(den, k = 3,
            border = 2:4)

den$height

dist_matrix <- as.dist(1 - abs(cor$correlation_matrix))

```


```{r Select representatives for group}
select_representatives <- function(data, response_var, variable_groups, random_effects, residual, criterion = "BIC") {
  
  cat("Criteria selection:", criterion, "\n\n")
  
  representatives <- c()
  group_results <- list()
  
  for (group_id in unique(variable_groups)) {
    group_vars <- names(variable_groups)[variable_groups == group_id]
    cat("Evaluation Group", group_id, ":", paste(group_vars, collapse = ", "), "\n")
    
    if (length(group_vars) == 1) {
      representatives <- c(representatives, group_vars)
      cat("  ✓ Single variable:", group_vars, "\n\n")
      next
    }
    
    group_comparison <- data.frame(
      variable = character(),
      aic = numeric(),
      bic = numeric(),
      heritability = numeric(),
      reliability = numeric(),
      R2 = numeric(),
      R2_adj = numeric(),
      loglik = numeric(),
      converged = logical(),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    for (var in group_vars) {
      cat("Test:", var, "... ")
      
      model <- tryCatch({
        asreml(
          fixed = as.formula(paste(response_var, "~ 1")),
          random = as.formula(paste(random_effects, "+", var)),
          residual = as.formula(residual),
          data = data,
          ai.sing = TRUE,
          workspace = 500e6
        )
      }, error = function(e) {
        cat("ERROR:", e$message, "\n")
        return(NULL)
      })
      
      if (!is.null(model)) {
        model <- update(model)
        
        loglik <- model$loglik
        n_params <- model$nedf
        n_obs <- nrow(data)
        
        aic <- -2 * loglik + 2 * n_params
        bic <- -2 * loglik + log(n_obs) * n_params
        
        # Heritability
        varcomp <- summary(model)$varcomp
        var_geno <- varcomp["geno", "component"]
        var_error <- varcomp["units", "component"]
        heritability <- var_geno / (var_geno + var_error)
        
        # Reliability
        G_hat <- predict(model, classify = 'geno', ignore = c('(Intercept)'))$pvals
        se <- G_hat$std.error
        pev <- se^2
        reliability <- 1 - (pev / var_geno)
        
        # R² and Adjusted R²
        r_squared <- NA
        adj_r_squared <- NA
        
        tryCatch({
          fitted_vals <- fitted(model)
          residuals_vals <- residuals(model)
          observed_vals <- data[[response_var]]
          
          complete_cases <- complete.cases(observed_vals, fitted_vals, residuals_vals)
          observed_clean <- observed_vals[complete_cases]
          fitted_clean <- fitted_vals[complete_cases]
          
          if (length(observed_clean) > 0 && length(fitted_clean) > 0) {
            ss_res <- sum((observed_clean - fitted_clean)^2, na.rm = TRUE)
            ss_tot <- sum((observed_clean - mean(observed_clean, na.rm = TRUE))^2, na.rm = TRUE)
            
            if (ss_tot > 0) {
              r_squared <- 1 - (ss_res / ss_tot)
              
              # Adjusted R²
              n <- length(observed_clean)
              p <- 1
              if (n > p + 1) {
                adj_r_squared <- 1 - ((1 - r_squared) * (n - 1) / (n - p - 1))
              }
            }
          }
        }, error = function(e) {
          cat("Warning: Could not calculate R² for variable:", var, "-", e$message, "\n")
        })
        
        group_comparison <- rbind(group_comparison, data.frame(
          variable = var,
          aic = aic,
          bic = bic,
          heritability = heritability,
          reliability = mean(reliability),
          R2 = r_squared,
          R2_adj = adj_r_squared,
          loglik = loglik,
          converged = TRUE
        ))
        
        cat("AIC:", round(aic, 2), "| BIC:", round(bic, 2), "| h²:", round(heritability, 3),
            "| Rel:", round(mean(reliability), 3), "| R²:", round(r_squared, 3),
            "| R² adj:", round(adj_r_squared, 3), "\n")
        
      } else {
        group_comparison <- rbind(group_comparison, data.frame(
          variable = var,
          aic = NA,
          bic = NA,
          heritability = NA,
          reliability = NA,
          R2 = NA,
          R2_adj = NA,
          loglik = NA,
          converged = FALSE
        ))
        cat("Fail\n")
      }
    }
    
    # Selección del mejor representante
    valid_models <- group_comparison[group_comparison$converged, ]
    
    if (nrow(valid_models) > 0) {
      best_idx <- switch(criterion,
                         "BIC" = which.min(valid_models$bic),
                         "AIC" = which.min(valid_models$aic),
                         "heritability" = which.max(valid_models$heritability),
                         "reliability" = which.max(valid_models$reliability),
                         "R sq" = which.max(valid_models$R2),
                         "R sq adjusted" = which.max(valid_models$R2_adj),
                         stop("Unknown criterion: ", criterion)
      )
      
      best_var <- valid_models$variable[best_idx]
      representatives <- c(representatives, best_var)
      
      # Asignar correctamente la columna del criterio
      criterion_col <- switch(criterion,
                              "AIC" = "aic",
                              "BIC" = "bic",
                              "heritability" = "heritability",
                              "reliability" = "reliability",
                              "R sq" = "R2",
                              "R sq adjusted" = "R2_adj")
      
      criterion_value <- valid_models[best_idx, criterion_col]
      
      cat("  ✓ Selected:", best_var)
      if (is.numeric(criterion_value)) {
        cat(" (", criterion, ":", round(criterion_value, 3), ")\n")
      } else {
        cat(" (", criterion, ": NA )\n")
      }
      
      group_results[[paste0("Group_", group_id)]] <- valid_models
    } else {
      cat("  ✗ No model converged in this group.\n")
    }
    
    cat("\n")
  }
  
  cat("-----Variables Selected-----\n")
  cat("Variables:", paste(representatives, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  cat("Total:", length(representatives), "variables of", length(unique(variable_groups)), "groups\n")
  
  return(list(
    representatives = representatives,
    group_results = group_results,
    selection_criterion = criterion
  ))
}

random_effects <- "~ blockNumber + geno"
residual<-"~ id(units)"
# Select representatives variables using groups as reference
rep_selection <- select_representatives(N23.All, "Grain.yield", cor$variable_groups, 
                                        random_effects, residual, "R sq")
rep_selection
```

```{r  Optimize model}
optimize_model <- function(data, response_var, predictor_vars, random_effects, residual, na_action = na.method(x = "include"), workspace = 500e6) {
  # Initialize a list to store model results
  model_results <- list()
  
  # Generate all combinations of predictors
  all_combinations <- unlist(lapply(1:length(predictor_vars), function(x) combn(predictor_vars, x, simplify = FALSE)), recursive = FALSE)
  
  # Loop through each combination of predictors
  for (predictors in all_combinations) {
    # Create the fixed formula
    fixed_formula <- as.formula(paste(response_var, "~", paste(predictors, collapse = " + ")))
    
    # Fit the model
    model <- tryCatch({
      asreml(
        fixed = fixed_formula,
        random = as.formula(random_effects),
        residual = as.formula(residual),
        na.action = na_action,
        data = data,
        ai.sing = TRUE,
        workspace = workspace
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("Error in model fitting for predictors:", predictors, "-", e$message, "\n")
      return(NULL)
    })
    
    # Update model
    model <- update(model)
    
    # Check if the model was fitted successfully
    if (!is.null(model)) {
      # Calculate AIC and BIC
      aic_value <- -2 * model$loglik + 2 * model$nedf  
      bic_value <- -2 * model$loglik + log(nrow(data)) * model$nedf
      
      # Calculate R² and Adjusted R²
      r_squared <- NA
      adj_r_squared <- NA
      
      tryCatch({
        # Get fitted values and residuals
        fitted_vals <- fitted(model)
        residuals_vals <- residuals(model)
        
        # Get observed values (remove NAs to match fitted values)
        observed_vals <- data[[response_var]]
        
        # Ensure we have the same length by removing NAs
        complete_cases <- complete.cases(observed_vals, fitted_vals, residuals_vals)
        observed_clean <- observed_vals[complete_cases]
        fitted_clean <- fitted_vals[complete_cases]
        
        if (length(observed_clean) > 0 && length(fitted_clean) > 0) {
          # Calculate R²
          ss_res <- sum((observed_clean - fitted_clean)^2, na.rm = TRUE)
          ss_tot <- sum((observed_clean - mean(observed_clean, na.rm = TRUE))^2, na.rm = TRUE)
          
          if (ss_tot > 0) {
            r_squared <- 1 - (ss_res / ss_tot)
            
            # Calculate Adjusted R²
            n <- length(observed_clean)
            p <- length(predictors)  # number of predictors
            
            if (n > p + 1) {
              adj_r_squared <- 1 - ((1 - r_squared) * (n - 1) / (n - p - 1))
            }
          }
        }
      }, error = function(e) {
        cat("Warning: Could not calculate R² for predictors:", predictors, "-", e$message, "\n")
      })
      
      # Get variance components
      variance_components <- summary(model)$varcomp
      
      # Extract genetic variance (adjust the name according to your random effects)
      var_geno <- 0
      if ("geno" %in% rownames(variance_components)) {
        var_geno <- variance_components["geno", "component"]
      }
      
      # Extract residual variance
      var_error <- variance_components["units", "component"]
      
      # Calculate heritability
      heritability <- var_geno / (var_geno + var_error)
      
      # Calculate reliability correctly using ASReml predictions
      reliability_mean <- NA
      
      tryCatch({
        # Get predictions for genotypes
        pred_geno <- predict(model, classify = "geno", ignore = c("(Intercept)", "rep"))
        
        if (!is.null(pred_geno) && "pvals" %in% names(pred_geno)) {
          pvals <- pred_geno$pvals
          
          if ("std.error" %in% names(pvals)) {
            # Method 1: Using prediction error variance (PEV)
            pev <- pvals$std.error^2
            
            # Reliability = 1 - (PEV / genetic_variance)
            if (var_geno > 0) {
              reliability <- 1 - (pev / var_geno)
              # Ensure reliability is between 0 and 1
              reliability <- pmax(0, pmin(1, reliability))
              reliability_mean <- mean(reliability, na.rm = TRUE)
            }
          }
        }
        
        # Alternative method: Using variance components directly
        if (is.na(reliability_mean) && var_geno > 0) {
          # Get the average standard error from the model
          if (!is.null(pred_geno) && "pvals" %in% names(pred_geno)) {
            avg_se <- mean(pred_geno$pvals$std.error, na.rm = TRUE)
            avg_pev <- avg_se^2
            reliability_mean <- 1 - (avg_pev / var_geno)
            reliability_mean <- max(0, min(1, reliability_mean))
          }
        }
        
      }, error = function(e) {
        cat("Warning: Could not calculate reliability for predictors:", predictors, "-", e$message, "\n")
        reliability_mean <<- NA
      })
      
      # Store the results
      model_results[[paste(predictors, collapse = "_")]] <- list(
        model = model,
        aic = aic_value,
        bic = bic_value,
        r_squared = r_squared,
        adj_r_squared = adj_r_squared,
        heritability = heritability,
        reliability_mean = reliability_mean,
        predictors = predictors,
        var_geno = var_geno,
        var_error = var_error
      )
    }
  }
  
  # Check if any models were fitted
  if (length(model_results) == 0) {
    stop("No models were fitted successfully. Please check your data and predictor variables.")
  }
  
  # Convert results to a data frame for easier analysis
  results_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(model_results, function(x) data.frame(
    predictors = paste(x$predictors, collapse = ", "),
    aic = x$aic,
    bic = x$bic,
    R2 = x$r_squared,
    R2_adj = x$adj_r_squared,
    heritability = x$heritability,
    reliability_mean = x$reliability_mean,
    var_geno = x$var_geno,
    var_error = x$var_error,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )))
  
  # Check if results_df is empty
  if (nrow(results_df) == 0) {
    stop("Results data frame is empty. No valid models were fitted.")
  }
  
  # Find the best model based on different criteria
  best_model_aic <- results_df[which.min(results_df$aic), ]
  best_model_bic <- results_df[which.min(results_df$bic), ]
  best_model_her <- results_df[which.max(results_df$heritability), ]
  
  # Best model based on R²
  valid_r_squared <- !is.na(results_df$r_squared)
  if (sum(valid_r_squared) > 0) {
    best_model_r2 <- results_df[valid_r_squared, ][which.max(results_df[valid_r_squared, ]$r_squared), ]
  } else {
    best_model_r2 <- results_df[1, ]
    best_model_r2$r_squared <- NA
  }
  
  # Best model based on Adjusted R²
  valid_adj_r_squared <- !is.na(results_df$adj_r_squared)
  if (sum(valid_adj_r_squared) > 0) {
    best_model_adj_r2 <- results_df[valid_adj_r_squared, ][which.max(results_df[valid_adj_r_squared, ]$adj_r_squared), ]
  } else {
    best_model_adj_r2 <- results_df[1, ]
    best_model_adj_r2$adj_r_squared <- NA
  }
  
  # For reliability, only consider models with valid (non-NA) reliability values
  valid_reliability <- !is.na(results_df$reliability_mean)
  if (sum(valid_reliability) > 0) {
    best_model_rel <- results_df[valid_reliability, ][which.max(results_df[valid_reliability, ]$reliability_mean), ]
  } else {
    best_model_rel <- results_df[1, ]  # Fallback to first model if no valid reliability
    best_model_rel$reliability_mean <- NA
  }
  
  # Retrieve the actual models corresponding to the best metrics
  best_model_aic_fit <- model_results[[gsub(", ", "_", best_model_aic$predictors)]]
  best_model_bic_fit <- model_results[[gsub(", ", "_", best_model_bic$predictors)]]
  best_model_her_fit <- model_results[[gsub(", ", "_", best_model_her$predictors)]]
  best_model_r2_fit <- model_results[[gsub(", ", "_", best_model_r2$predictors)]]
  best_model_adj_r2_fit <- model_results[[gsub(", ", "_", best_model_adj_r2$predictors)]]
  best_model_rel_fit <- model_results[[gsub(", ", "_", best_model_rel$predictors)]]
  
  return(list(
    all_models = model_results,
    results_df = results_df,
    best_model_aic = best_model_aic,
    best_model_bic = best_model_bic,
    best_model_her = best_model_her,
    best_model_r2 = best_model_r2,
    best_model_adj_r2 = best_model_adj_r2,
    best_model_rel = best_model_rel,
    best_model_aic_fit = best_model_aic_fit,
    best_model_bic_fit = best_model_bic_fit,
    best_model_her_fit = best_model_her_fit,
    best_model_r2_fit = best_model_r2_fit,
    best_model_adj_r2_fit = best_model_adj_r2_fit,
    best_model_rel_fit = best_model_rel_fit
  ))
}
```


```{r}
# Define Model's components
response_var <- "Grain.yield"
predictor_vars <- rep_selection$representatives
random_effects <- "~ blockNumber + geno"
residual<-"~ id(units)"

# Call the function
N23.optim <- optimize_model(N23.All, response_var, predictor_vars, random_effects, residual)
```

```{r}
N23.optim$best_model_aic

N23.optim$best_model_bic

N23.optim$best_model_rel

N23.optim$best_model_r2

N23.optim$best_model_her

N23_results<-N23.optim$results_df
N23_results
```

```{r}
N22.All<-N22.All%>%
    mutate(
    NDVI_mean = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("NDVI")), na.rm = TRUE),
    GNDVI_mean = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("GNDVI")), na.rm = TRUE),
    EVI_mean = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("EVI")), na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
cor.N22<-analyze_correlations(N22.All, variables_candidates)

rep_selection.N22 <- select_representatives(N22.All, "Grain.yield", cor.N22$variable_groups, 
                                        random_effects, residual, "R sq")
predictor_vars.N22<-rep_selection.N22$representatives
N22.optim <- optimize_model(N22.All, response_var, predictor_vars.N22, random_effects, residual)
N22_results<-N22.optim$results_df
N22_results
```

```{r}
S22.All<-S22.All%>%
    mutate(
    NDVI_mean = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("NDVI")), na.rm = TRUE),
    GNDVI_mean = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("GNDVI")), na.rm = TRUE),
    EVI_mean = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("EVI")), na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
cor.S22<-analyze_correlations(S22.All, variables_candidates)

rep_selection.S22 <- select_representatives(S22.All, "Grain.yield", cor.S22$variable_groups, 
                                        random_effects, residual, "R sq")
predictor_vars.S22<-rep_selection.S22$representatives
predictor_vars.S22

S22.optim <- optimize_model(S22.All, response_var, predictor_vars.S22, random_effects, residual)
S22_results<-S22.optim$results_df
S22_results
```
```{r}
S23.All<-S23.All%>%
    mutate(
    NDVI_mean = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("NDVI")), na.rm = TRUE),
    GNDVI_mean = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("GNDVI")), na.rm = TRUE),
    EVI_mean = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("EVI")), na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
cor.S23<-analyze_correlations(S23.All, variables_candidates)

rep_selection.S23 <- select_representatives(S23.All, "Grain.yield", cor.S23$variable_groups, 
                                        random_effects, residual, "R sq")
predictor_vars.S23<-rep_selection.S23$representatives
S23.optim <- optimize_model(S23.All, response_var, predictor_vars.S23, random_effects, residual)
S23_results<-S23.optim$results_df
S23_results
```

```{r}
U22.All<-U22.All%>%
    mutate(
    NDVI_mean = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("NDVI")), na.rm = TRUE),
    GNDVI_mean = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("GNDVI")), na.rm = TRUE),
    EVI_mean = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("EVI")), na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
cor.U22<-analyze_correlations(U22.All, variables_candidates)

rep_selection.U22 <- select_representatives(U22.All, "Grain.yield", cor.U22$variable_groups, 
                                        random_effects, residual, "R sq")
predictor_vars.U22<-rep_selection.U22$representatives
U22.optim <- optimize_model(U22.All, response_var, predictor_vars.U22, random_effects, residual)
U22_results<-U22.optim$results_df
U22_results
```

```{r}
U23.All<-U23.All%>%
    mutate(
    NDVI_mean = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("NDVI")), na.rm = TRUE),
    GNDVI_mean = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("GNDVI")), na.rm = TRUE),
    EVI_mean = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("EVI")), na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
cor.U23<-analyze_correlations(U23.All, variables_candidates)

rep_selection.U23 <- select_representatives(U23.All, "Grain.yield", cor.U23$variable_groups, 
                                        random_effects, residual, "R sq")
predictor_vars.U23<-rep_selection.U23$representatives
U23.optim <- optimize_model(U23.All, response_var, predictor_vars.U23, random_effects, residual)
U23_results<-U23.optim$results_df
U23_results
```
